cleanrooms.configuredtableassociation.Cf: Creates a configured table association. A configured table association links a configured table with a collaboration.

cleanrooms.configuredtableassociation.Co.Description: A unique identifier for the configured table to be associated to. Currently accepts a configured table ID.

cleanrooms.configuredtableassociation.De.Description: A description of the configured table association.

cleanrooms.configuredtableassociation.Me.Description: The unique ID for the membership this configured table association belongs to.

cleanrooms.configuredtableassociation.Na.Description: The name of the configured table association, in lowercase. The table is identified by this name when running protected queries against the underlying data.

cleanrooms.configuredtableassociation.Ro.Description: The service will assume this role to access catalog metadata and query the table.

cleanrooms.configuredtableassociation.Ta.Description: An optional label that you can assign to a resource when you create it. Each tag consists of a key and an optional value, both of which you define. When you use tagging, you can also use tag-based access control in IAM policies to control access to this resource.
